---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://youwei-hu.shinyapps.io/dashboard_app/" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">EEG Biomarker Dashboard</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>An interactive Shiny dashboard comparing resting-state EEG biomarkers 
between Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) and Alzheimer's Disease (AD) 
patients. Built using R Shiny and flexdashboard with data from the 
Goizueta Brain Health Institute at Emory University.</p>
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/data555_Dashboard" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">
GitHub Repo
</a>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/Shedding-Kinetics-Modeling" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Bayesian Modeling of Viral Shedding Dynamics</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>Developed a Bayesian hierarchical model in Stan to characterize viral shedding dynamics by integrating heterogeneous laboratory measurements, including viral load concentration and Ct values. The model accounts for censoring mechanisms and estimates a shared latent viral trajectory, improving inference in settings with incomplete or sparse data.</p>
<a href="baysesian.html" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary"> 
View Project</a>
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/Shedding-Kinetics-Modeling" class="btn btn-sm btn-default"> 
GitHub Repo
</a>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/shedding-hub" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Viral Shedding Data Integration Pipeline</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>Built a standardized dataset of longitudinal viral shedding data by extracting information from published studies, including figures, tables, and supplementary materials. Developed a structured data pipeline using LLM-assisted extraction and YAML-based schemas to harmonize heterogeneous data sources such as Ct values and viral load measurements, enabling downstream modeling and analysis.</p>
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/shedding-hub" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">
GitHub Repo
</a>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>
